siteMetadata.title: 瑶ノ子 - YokoTamanoko.com
siteMetadata.subtitle: I produce my art by the beautiful scene that comes to my mind.

frontmatter.title: New My Lifestyle with Headphones
frontmatter.description: I'm sensitive to sounds from childhood. It's difficult for me to distinguish human's voice at a busy place. On the other hand, sometimes I'm get distracted by the slightest sound in a quiet room.
